skills.name: agent-tty
skills.description: Terminal and TUI automation CLI for AI agents. Use when the user needs to create a terminal session, run a command in a terminal, automate an interactive CLI or TUI, wait for terminal output, capture a TUI screenshot, export a terminal recording, or test a CLI workflow with reviewable artifacts.

skills.name: dogfood-tui
skills.description: Structured TUI dogfooding and QA workflow using agent-tty. Use for exploratory testing, bug hunting, release-readiness validation, and UX review of terminal applications.
